parts.text: 11 - حدثنا محمد بن همام ومحمد بن الحسن بن جمهور جميعاً، عن

text: : قال أمير المؤمنين: بأبي ابن خيرة الإماء (يعنى القائم من ولده ) يسومهم خسفا، ويسقيهم بكأس مصبرة، ولا يعطيهم إلاّ السيف هرجاً فعند ذلك تتمنى فجرة قريش لو أن لها مفاداة من الدنيا وما فيها ليغفر لها، لا نكف عنهم حتى يرضى الله.

en.abdullah-al-shahin: (11) Muhammad bin Hammam and Muhammad bin al-Hasan bin Jumhoor narrated from al-Hasan bin Muhammad bin Jumhoor from his father from Sulayman bin Suma’a from Abul Jarood from al-Qassim bin al-Waleed al-Hamadani from al-Harith al-A’war al-Hamadani that Amirul Mo’mineen (as) had said: “Blessed is the son of the best of the bondmaids! (He means al-Qa’im) He will humiliate the arrogants and water them a bitter nauseous drink. His sword will kill them terribly. Then the arrogants of Quraysh wish if they could redeem themselves with the world and all that it has just to be forgiven. He will not stop until he pleases Allah.”
